name: 桜吹雪の河川敷
prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic environment image for a modern web novel. Emphasize atmosphere, lighting, believable architecture, realistic materials, and a unified live-action visual language shared with all other generated assets. Quiet fictional Tokyo riverside jogging course in early April dawn, cherry blossoms at full bloom starting to scatter in the wind, long embankment path, soft blue morning light, urban bridges in the distance, believable Japanese river engineering, subtle sense that someone unseen is protecting an ordinary morning run. No main characters in close-up. Final delivery will be cropped to 1440x2304. Keep the main focal area centered with safe margins. Negative prompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, logo, watermark, character close-up, deformed architecture, low detail, tourist festival crowd, fantasy sakura tunnel, overt combat, readable signs
